name: AéroMultiverse
short_description: Mini adventure game, superheroes, based on the universe of the literary saga Aéro by Alexandre Molina. Independent amateur mini game to mark the release of volume 4 of Aéro. Fight a secret cult, use Aero's powers and investigate the meteorite
detailed_description: Mini adventure game, superheroes, based on the universe of the literary saga Aéro by Alexandre Molina.  Independent amateur mini game to mark the release of volume 4 of Aéro. Fight a secret cult, use Aero's powers and investigate the meteorite. It's an adventure game, RPG in third or first person of your choice. 10 main mission; 6 side missions, ester eggs to find.
about_the_game: Mini adventure game, superheroes, based on the universe of the literary saga Aéro by Alexandre Molina.  Independent amateur mini game to mark the release of volume 4 of Aéro. Fight a secret cult, use Aero's powers and investigate the meteorite. It's an adventure game, RPG in third or first person of your choice. 10 main mission; 6 side missions, ester eggs to find.
